 ↑↓ scroll▕ j/k row ▕ ↹ section▕ ↵ open ▕ pgup/pgdn page▕ e edit                
 c comment▕ + label ▕ - unlabel▕ a owner▕ A unassign    ▕ x close               
 r reopen ▕ p parent▕ b block  ▕ l link ▕ ! priority    ▕ N child               
 L layout ▕ esc back▕ ? help   ▕ q quit
